name: ibanforge
description: IBAN validation & BIC/SWIFT lookup API for AI agents

tools.name: validate_iban
tools.description: Validate a single IBAN and look up the associated BIC/bank

tools.name: batch_validate_iban
tools.description: Validate up to 100 IBANs in one call

tools.name: lookup_bic
tools.description: Look up a BIC/SWIFT code for institution details and LEI

bic.description: BIC code (8 or 11 characters, e.g., UBSWCHZH80A)
